overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a blue sports car driving through foggy nighttime city highways. The camera smoothly tracks the vehicle as it navigates from an intersection onto multi-lane roads, passing trucks and approaching a commercial district with neon-lit buildings in the distance.

events.description: blue sports car pulls out from intersection and accelerates onto the main highway
approaching a large truck driving ahead in the same lane

agents.ego_description: blue sports car navigating from intersection onto multi-lane highway, accelerating smoothly through the fog

notable_agents.action: large dark truck driving ahead with visible red taillights through the fog

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and control box at the intersection
tall streetlight casting bright light through the foggy atmosphere
distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows barely visible through heavy fog
concrete barrier running along the right edge of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a foggy urban intersection at night, with the blue sports car pulling onto a multi-lane highway. Streetlights pierce through the heavy fog, illuminating the road ahead where a large truck is visible in the distance. The camera smoothly tracks the car as it accelerates, with the city skyline barely visible through the haze.

events.description: sports car overtakes the large truck on the left side
green cargo truck passes by in the left lane, moving faster than the sports car

agents.ego_description: sports car cruising at high speed on the highway, maneuvering past slower traffic while maintaining a central lane position

notable_agents.action: large green cargo truck with container trailer passing by in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: dark colored semi-truck with illuminated taillights driving ahead on the highway
large truck with green shipping container and bright red taillights

segments.scene_description: The car continues driving along the fog-shrouded highway, overtaking a large truck ahead. A green cargo truck passes by in the left lane, its red taillights cutting through the mist. Streetlights line both sides of the road, creating pools of light in the fog while the distant city skyline remains visible on the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching commercial district with neon signage

events.description: green truck moves ahead and exits the frame
approaching a brightly lit commercial area with gas station and billboards becoming visible

agents.ego_description: car continues driving toward a commercial zone with increasing light pollution from neon signs and building lights

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen with bright white and yellow lights
cluster of bright white fluorescent lights from a fuel station or commercial complex
vertical red light pillars or searchlights piercing upward through the fog
silhouetted palm trees lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car approaching a commercial district, with bright gas station lights and illuminated billboards becoming visible through the fog. Distinctive vertical red light beams pierce the night sky ahead. The green truck has moved ahead and exited view, leaving the sports car to cruise toward the neon-lit commercial area with palm trees silhouetted on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a blue sports car as it travels from a hazy urban intersection into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins with the car pulling onto a multi-lane highway at night, where streetlights pierce through heavy fog and a distant truck looms in the haze. As the car accelerates, the camera maintains its pursuit while the vehicle overtakes a large truck and passes a green cargo truck whose red taillights cut through the mist. The scene then shifts as the fog begins to reveal the outskirts of a commercial hub, with bright gas station lights and illuminated billboards emerging from the gloom. Finally, the camera follows the car toward distinctive vertical red light beams and silhouetted palm trees as it cruises into the glowing heart of the city.
